summary: Strong unit test coverage of core parsing and compliance checking logic with excellent organization and realistic mocks. Main gaps: (1) The main() CLI entry point is completely untested, creating regression risk for argument parsing, exit code logic, and error message formatting; (2) Version specifiers ~= and != are mentioned in docstrings but not explicitly tested; (3) Config files with missing allow/deny keys not tested (though code handles with defaults). Would reliably catch logic bugs in core functions but miss integration issues and CLI-related regressions.
